title: gladiolus velutinus
intro: Gladiolus velutinus, also known as the soft gladiolus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of gladiolus velutinus include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in reducing fever and relieving rheumatic pain. Herbal preparations of gladiolus velutinus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
